<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as BaseCommand; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/command */ class COMMAND extends BaseCommand { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'COMMAND'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { // Relay (RESP3) uses maps and it might be good // to make the return value a breaking change return $data; } }
